title: Kuro’s Crew Clashes With the Straw Hats
description: On pages 15–18, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I suffered waiting for so long...

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: I was a captain in the past...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And I had to serve such a young, naive little girl obsequiously...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: deliberately to make her like me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Can you understand how demeaning my days have been...?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Now that I think of it, I...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Still haven't thanked you for that punch you gave me last time...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If you really hate being hit...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I must make sure I hit you a few hundred more times!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
